discover.page_description: Explore our 8 training formats and exercise library.
discover.heading: Explore your playground
discover.subtitle: Training formats, exercises and everything you need to progress.

formats.page_description: 8 equipment-free training formats: Pyramid, Strength, Superset, EMOM, Circuit, AMRAP, HIIT and Tabata. Discover each method.
formats.heading: Session formats
formats.intro: 8 formats alternate throughout the week: intense sessions are shorter, strength and endurance sessions longer. All include warm-up and cool-down.
formats.footer_note: Durations shown include warm-up and cool-down.

exercises.page_description: All Wan2Fit exercises: detailed guides with execution, variants, tips and common mistakes.
exercises.heading: Our exercises
exercises.intro: Find detailed guides for our exercises: execution, breathing, variants, tips and common mistakes.
